raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.1":"The broad request to make the passage stronger centrally implicates reframing the contribution claim and causal-routing thesis above the sentence level.","R1.2":"The artifact contains strong causal and optimality assertions whose internal logic is load-bearing for any strengthened version.","R1.3":"The reported empirical metrics must align with claims about cost, success retention, robustness, and policy optimality.","R1.6":"A stronger paper passage normally requires sentence- and paragraph-level tightening, clearer register, and removal of awkward or imprecise phrasing.","RX.1":"The projection should preserve uncertainty around empirical estimates, assumptions, and causal identification limits.","RX.2":"The artifact includes sweeping claims such as uniqueness under every monotone utility, making overclaim control essential.","RX.3":"The delegation asks only for strengthening the research writing, not executing edits or auditing the whole paper.","RX.4":"Because the passage concerns deployment-time model routing and causal claims, avoiding misleading operational conclusions matters.","RX.5":"Any strengthening responsibility should remain traceable to the stated experiments, variables, assumptions, and reported metrics."}}

rationale.R1.1: The broad request to make the passage stronger centrally implicates reframing the contribution claim and causal-routing thesis above the sentence level.
rationale.R1.2: The artifact contains strong causal and optimality assertions whose internal logic is load-bearing for any strengthened version.
rationale.R1.3: The reported empirical metrics must align with claims about cost, success retention, robustness, and policy optimality.
rationale.R1.6: A stronger paper passage normally requires sentence- and paragraph-level tightening, clearer register, and removal of awkward or imprecise phrasing.
rationale.RX.1: The projection should preserve uncertainty around empirical estimates, assumptions, and causal identification limits.
rationale.RX.2: The artifact includes sweeping claims such as uniqueness under every monotone utility, making overclaim control essential.
rationale.RX.3: The delegation asks only for strengthening the research writing, not executing edits or auditing the whole paper.
rationale.RX.4: Because the passage concerns deployment-time model routing and causal claims, avoiding misleading operational conclusions matters.
rationale.RX.5: Any strengthening responsibility should remain traceable to the stated experiments, variables, assumptions, and reported metrics.
